units.title: Turn Your Voice to an Effective Communication Tool

meta.course-unit-read:
For a voice to be effective as a communication tool, you have to:
  • Experiment with your voice
  • Sing along with the music that you like
  • Have fun with it

units.title: Important Keys to Keep your Confidence

meta.course-unit-read:
The three keys to keep your confidence:
  • Surround yourself with inspiring people
  • Make time for your self
  • Read stories about inspiring people

  • Synthesize relevant information
  • Use your emotions

meta.course-unit-read:
The 4 tips to take into account when preparing your icebreakers:
  • Speak Personally
  • Consider your audience
  • Make sure your humor is not offensive
  • Be grateful

meta.course-unit-read:
The three tips for speaking to the media:
  • Be direct and straight to the point
  • Remain calm and cool
  • Relate to the audience
